title: agentic-model Configuration
description: OpenAI-compatible agentic model processor with tool calling support

consumer_name_suffix.description: Suffix appended to consumer names for uniqueness

delete_consumer_on_stop.description: Delete durable consumers on Stop (use for tests only)

initial_delay.description: Initial retry delay for transient errors

max_attempts.description: Maximum retry attempts for transient errors (5xx/network)

max_delay.description: Maximum retry delay (caps both generic and rate-limit backoff)

max_rate_limit_retries.description: Maximum retry attempts for 429 rate-limit responses (separate from generic retries)

rate_limit_delay.description: Initial delay when rate limited (429) — doubles each attempt

stream_name.description: JetStream stream name for agentic messages
